Professional Indoor Display Solutions with Durable Vinyl Banners PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Professional Banner Stand Displays 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Heavy Duty Banner Applications Banner Soft Fabric for Premium Trade Show Displays (2) 13 oz Vinyl Banners for Double-Sided Display Applications (2) 14 oz Blockout No Curl Vinyl for Professional Trade Shows (2) Banner Soft Fabric for Premium Double-Sided Displays Product Configuration: With Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty Hardware PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Indoor Display Solutions with Durable Vinyl Banners

The Versatile Banner Stand Heavy Duty Combo provides excellent stability, easy adjustment and is capable of holding two different banners to create a double-sided display. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick. Dowels are included.

The Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand has all the same features as the regular stand, but with added strength and weight for professional trade show applications.

The printed banners will have a 2" pole pocket on the top and bottom. Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom. Price includes the Banner Stand Hardware and a 24" x 72" Full-Color Printed Banner for immediate display setup.

Perfect for trade shows, retail displays, conferences, and professional presentations where portability and durability are essential.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Material Options for Professional Display Applications

Vinyl Material for Banner Stand Applications

Our high quality 13 oz vinyl banner material is the standard material we use for banner stands. It is rated for both indoor and outdoor use and provides excellent durability for repeated setup and breakdown. You can select to have either (1) 13 oz vinyl banner or (2) 13 oz vinyl banners printed for double-sided display applications.

The 14 oz No Curl Vinyl option provides additional weight and stability, preventing curling during extended display periods in trade show environments.

Fabric Material for Banner Stand Applications

Our Banner Soft material is our fabric option for banner stands. The material offers a matte finish with vibrant print colors ideal for professional presentations. The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend careful handling when retracting the banner to maintain professional appearance.

You can select to have either (1) fabric banner or (2) fabric banners printed for the stand, perfect for premium trade show displays.

Request a sample packet of materials to compare options for your specific display needs.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Setup & Hardware Configuration

All banners for the Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand include professionally finished 2" pole pockets on the top and bottom for secure mounting with the included dowel hardware.

The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick. This versatility allows you to display both printed banners and rigid signage materials.

The Heavy Duty hardware configuration provides enhanced stability compared to standard banner stands, making it ideal for high-traffic trade show environments where stability is crucial.

The stand breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy transportation between events, with all hardware components designed for repeated assembly and disassembly.

Keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges to ensure visibility when mounted in the pole pocket system.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for banner stand orders. Choose from our production options to match your event timeline:

2 Business Days Express Production

Need your banner stand quickly? The express option delivers professional results on an accelerated timeline.

  • Turnaround starts from the time file upload is complete
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency rushes available in select cases
  • Total delivery time includes production plus shipping time

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option, providing the ideal balance of speed and value for trade show preparation.

  • Free standard production for custom banner stands
  • Sufficient time for most trade show planning schedules
  • Includes thorough quality control review
  • Turnaround begins after artwork approval

5 Business Days Saver Production

Budget-friendly option when you have additional planning time for your display needs.

  • Cost-effective production for advance orders
  • Same quality standards as expedited options
  • Ideal for planned trade show campaigns
  • Additional time allows for comprehensive pre-press review

Note: Production time begins when artwork is approved. If an order requires prepress review or proof approval, timing starts from approval confirmation.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Banner Stand Orders

All banner stand orders must be paid prior to production start to ensure timely delivery for your display needs.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards
  • Business and personal checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Purchase orders available - contact customer service for setup

Credit cards are charged only after you approve your proof, giving you complete control over the final design before production begins.

For check payments, please allow additional time for processing before your banner stand production timeline begins. Learn more about check payment processing.

If you need to establish a purchase order account for recurring trade show display orders, please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for account setup options.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Stand Hardware Delivery

Professional shipping options ensure your banner stand arrives ready for your display event. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for shipping questions.

Professional Shipping Methods Available

  • Economy (5-10 Business Days) - Cost-effective for advance planning
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days) - Most popular for trade show delivery
  • Three Day (3 Business Days) - Reliable for event deadlines
  • Two Day (2 Business Days) - Express delivery for urgent needs
  • Overnight (1 Business Day) - Emergency delivery available

Tracking numbers are provided once your banner stand ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress.

Shipping costs are determined by package weight and destination. Due to the size and weight of banner stand hardware, additional charges may apply for oversized packages.

International Shipping: Contact us for quotes outside the Continental United States. International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept USPS and UPS international labels.

Important Delivery Notes:

  • Shipping company terms apply for delays or lost packages after pickup
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost packages are replaced after shipping company confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days)
  • Natural disasters or circumstances beyond our control do not qualify for shipping refunds

Plan ahead for trade shows and events, as delivery timing is managed by shipping carriers once your banner stand leaves our facility.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Applications for Trade Show Banner Stands

The Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand is designed for professional display applications where portability, durability, and visual impact are essential.

Trade Show & Convention Applications

  • Trade show booth displays and backdrop systems
  • Convention center presentations and demonstrations
  • Professional conference displays
  • Industry expo marketing materials

Business & Retail Display Uses

  • Retail store promotional displays
  • Corporate lobby and reception area signage
  • Sales presentation materials
  • Product launch announcements

Event & Presentation Applications

  • Corporate events and meetings
  • Educational seminars and workshops
  • Professional networking events
  • Training and instructional displays

The double-sided capability allows you to display different messages or create 360-degree visibility in high-traffic environments. The compact breakdown design makes transportation between multiple events efficient and cost-effective.

Heavy duty hardware construction ensures stable display performance even in busy trade show environments where foot traffic and air movement can affect lighter display systems.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Guidelines for Banner Stand Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your banner stand display. We've provided a Design Template to help you create artwork to specifications.

Professional Design Requirements

Vector-based .eps files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality. We also accept high resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. If you're unsure about file resolution or format compatibility, our professional graphic designers can assist with artwork optimization.

File specifications:

  • Minimum 300 dpi resolution for raster images
  • Vector formats preferred for text and logo elements
  • Keep important content at least 3" from top and bottom edges
  • Account for 2" pole pocket areas in design layout

Order Proof Options

Request an order proof to review your banner stand design before production. Your proof includes a low-resolution preview of your artwork, complete order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information confirmation.

Proof approval is required via email or phone before production begins, giving you final control over the design.

Color Match Proof System

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color representation for your specific banner stand application. This service is recommended for brand-sensitive displays where precise color matching is essential.

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for detailed information about color matching services and to discuss your specific display requirements.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Banner Stands for Your Next Trade Show

Ready to create professional displays that make an impact? Our Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand combines portability, durability, and professional presentation quality in one complete package.

Complete Package Includes:

  • Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand Hardware
  • 24" x 72" Full-Color Printed Banner
  • Mounting dowels and all necessary hardware
  • Compact carrying case for transportation

Choose from multiple material options, production timelines, and shipping methods to match your specific event requirements. Our customer service team of professional graphic designers is available Monday–Friday 8AM–4PM CST to assist with your order.

Why Choose Our Banner Stand Solutions:

  • Professional graphic design customer service team
  • Flexible 1-5 day production options
  • Quality materials and latest printing technology
  • Live order tracking system
  • Complete hardware and banner packages

Contact us at (320) 391-5300 for custom quotes, design assistance, or questions about your trade show display needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Hardware & Display FAQ

What's included with the Heavy Duty Banner Stand package?

Each package includes the Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand hardware, a 24" x 72" full-color printed banner with pole pockets, mounting dowels, and a compact carrying case for transportation.

Can I display two different banners on the same stand?

Yes, the Heavy Duty Versatile Banner Stand is designed to hold two different banners for double-sided display applications, perfect for trade shows where 360-degree visibility is important.

What material works best for repeated trade show use?

For frequent trade show applications, we recommend the 13 oz or 14 oz vinyl materials for their durability and resistance to wear from repeated rolling and setup. The fabric option provides a premium appearance but requires more careful handling.

How portable is the banner stand system?

The Heavy Duty stand breaks down completely into a flat, compact box for easy transportation. Despite the enhanced stability, it remains portable enough for regular trade show travel.

What's the difference between Heavy Duty and standard banner stands?

The Heavy Duty version provides additional weight and structural strength for enhanced stability in high-traffic environments, while maintaining the same portability and setup convenience.

Can I use my own artwork files?

Yes, we accept vector-based .eps files, high-resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. Our design template helps ensure your artwork is properly sized for the pole pocket system.

What if I need my banner stand for a specific event date?

We offer production times from 2-5 business days, plus shipping time. Contact our customer service team with your event date, and we'll recommend the best production and shipping combination to meet your deadline.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
